channel.title: Tories on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Tories on adoption curve dot net

item.title: The (white) elephant in the room
item.description: [![Elephant]Politicians and IT usually go together like fish and bicycles. The story of public-sector IT in the UK is generally one of grandiose over-budget failures at the top end of the scale, and low-level outsourced inadequacies at the other. The same is also true in the private sector, of course, but the public sector situation gets a higher profile by the fact that it’s “our” money that’s being wasted and it’s more difficult to sweep the disasters under the carpet.
